summary: The reflectance spectra for wells C1 through C12 have been measured. A general trend observed across all wells is a significantly higher reflectance in the orange and yellow regions of the spectrum compared to other colors, particularly violet and indigo. While there are variations between wells, this overall spectral shape suggests a common characteristic of the material within the wells, potentially related to its absorption or scattering properties in different wavelength ranges.
